metadata.name: TimeMachine [Fixed]
metadata.description:
Machines and beggars speed up while you use them, saving your real-world time without breaking the in-game timer.
This is a maintained version of [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2617557401]TimeMachine[/url] by @tarako. You only need to enable TimeMachine [Fixed]; the original mod is not required.
SUPPORTED
- Slot Machine and Fortune Telling Machine - Crane Game - Blood Donation Machine and Confessional - Shell Game and Hell Game - Greed Donation Machine - Beggar, Devil Beggar, Key Master, Bomb Bum, Battery Bum, and Rotten Beggar - Multiplayer
KEY FIXES
- Fixed Boss Rush, Hush, and Mausoleum Boss Rush entrances failing to open when reached within their time limits. - Fixed crashes involving Soul of the Forgotten, Soul of Jacob and Esau, Strawman, or Found Soul when using Blood Donation Machines. - Fixed players passing through beggars, being pushed to an abnormal distance, or teleporting at high speed.
SAFETY & CONFIGURATION
Configure maximum speed, acceleration, and individual machine toggles with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3701683951]Mod Config Menu[/url].
- Flies spawned by shell games, hell games, and beggars are removed so accelerated interactions cannot hurt you (MCM: KillSpawnedFlies, on by default). - Troll bombs from machines and beggars are delayed until the interaction ends (MCM: DefuseSpawnedBombs, on by default). - Acceleration stops when the next donation could kill you, including the increased Blood Donation Machine damage from Womb onward (MCM: PreventSuddenDeath, on by default). - The Lost using The Chariot, Keeper, and a recently revived Lazarus are handled safely. Disable PreventSuddenDeath if you intentionally want to donate rapidly while invincible. - Player speed and the in-game timer accelerate with the machine to prevent unintended advantages.
让机器和乞丐在连续使用时越来越快，节省现实时间，同时保持游戏内计时公平。
本修复版支持老虎机、预言机、娃娃机、献血机、告解室、三选一游戏、贪婪存款机以及各种乞丐，并支持多人游戏。只需启用 TimeMachine [Fixed]，无需同时启用旧版。
主要修复：
- 修复在时限内到达，Boss Rush、凹凸及陵墓 Boss Rush 入口仍无法开启的问题。 - 修复骨哥符文、双子符文、稻草人和复得幽魂使用献血机时导致的崩溃。 - 修复高速互动时穿过乞丐、距离异常或瞬移的问题。
所有速度与机器开关均可在 [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3701683951]Mod Config Menu[/url] 中调整。默认还会清除互动生成的苍蝇、延缓即爆炸弹，并在下一次献血可能致死时自动停止加速；这些安全功能都可以单独关闭。
发现其他问题，欢迎留言反馈！
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │★ Check out my other fixed mod: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2916069863]GoodTrip [Fixed][/url] ★│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
